overall.description: A samurai warrior stands on a wooden mountain platform overlooking a vast valley with storm clouds gathering overhead. The scene is from a video game (Ghost of Tsushima), featuring cinematic third-person perspective with dramatic lighting and autumn foliage visible on distant peaks.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden viewing platform on mountain overlook

events.description: character turns head to the left to survey the landscape
character returns to facing forward, continuing observation

agents.ego_description: samurai stands still on wooden platform, occasionally turning head to survey the stormy mountain vista ahead

entered.detail: thick wooden support beams of the shelter structure
distant mountain summit with rocky outcrops visible through the mist
dark dramatic storm clouds covering the sky with patches of lighter clouds
dense forest with golden yellow and green autumn foliage covering the hills
wooden fence railing at the edge of the viewing platform

segments.scene_description: The samurai stands under a wooden shelter on a mountain overlook, gazing out at a dramatic landscape of autumn-colored forests and distant peaks beneath stormy skies. The character shifts posture slightly, turning to survey the surroundings before returning to face the central vista, while the camera maintains a steady third-person perspective from behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady third-person perspective of a samurai overlooking a vast, storm-swept mountain landscape. It begins with the warrior standing under a wooden shelter, gazing out at a dramatic vista of autumn-colored forests and distant peaks. As the character shifts his posture, the camera captures his slight turn to survey the immediate surroundings. The scene then settles as he returns his focus to the central horizon, where dark clouds gather over the vibrant foliage of the valley below.
